project.title: ¿Qué pasaría si se jugara un Mundial de fútbol en la antigüedad?
project.tone: Crónica épica y divertida tipo torneo: un Mundial de fútbol jugado por las civilizaciones antiguas y sus guerreros. La NARRACIÓN va en tercera persona sobre los equipos y, en especial, sobre el equipo de Mesoamérica (como '¿qué pasaría si México ganara el Mundial?'), NUNCA en segunda persona y NUNCA menciona al esqueleto. Aprovecha el hype del Mundial. Autoconclusivo, sin gore.
project.render_notes: Huesito es el CRACK del equipo de Mesoamérica (guerrero águila/jaguar futbolista), pero la voz no lo nombra. Coherencia: Huesito siempre VIVO — cráneo de hueso marfil limpio y pulido, grandes ojos café vivos y expresivos, esqueleto atleta cálido y animado, NUNCA Pixar/clínico y NUNCA un zombi/no-muerto/yokai. Los image_prompt Y animation_prompt son LARGOS y ULTRA-detallados y COMPLEMENTAN los ingredientes ('the provided…', cámara distinta por escena, KEY ACTION first 2s, 'keep… EXACTLY as provided'). Cada civilización juega CON su atuendo guerrero (gladiadores, samuráis, espartanos, monjes shaolin, vikingos, faraones, mongoles, guerreros mesoamericanos), todo como arquetipos históricos SIN IP, sin escudos/logos/marcas reales, sin jugadores reales; copa dorada genérica. Sin gore (es fútbol, no combate real). Cada pueblo se ve de su cultura (los mesoamericanos morenos, cabello negro). Carteles de FASE de torneo (Octavos→Final) dichos por la voz. Cierre cerrado + ending_card.

huesito.description: Esqueleto semi-realista, cráneo de hueso marfil envejecido y texturizado con poros y grietas finas, dientes creíbles, grandes ojos redondos color café muy vivos y expresivos, complexión alta y esbelta. Personaje base pre-existente: NO se genera, solo se usa como referencia.

ingredients.edit_prompt: Take the provided base skeleton — a FULL anatomical skeleton with bony hands — and dress IT as the star player of an ancient Mesoamerican (Aztec/Maya) football team, a fusion of eagle-jaguar warrior and footballer; it MUST remain a full skeleton simply wearing the regalia (NOT a human, NOT a person in a skull mask). Outfit, described exactly: a fitted sleeveless football jersey in deep jade-green and turquoise woven cloth with bands of geometric Aztec step-fret patterns in gold and terracotta along the hem and shoulders, NO modern crest or sponsor; over one shoulder a short feathered mantle of emerald-green quetzal and golden-brown eagle feathers; carved jade and obsidian bead bracelets on both wrists; a wide woven hip-protector belt of the ancient ball game in tan leather with jade studs; knee-high green sport socks laced with leather; football boots reimagined in tan leather with jade accents and obsidian studs; a thin band of black-and-white face-paint markings around the eyes. Rich woven-cloth, feather, leather and jade textures, earthy and vivid colors, no readable text, no logos. Plain neutral light-grey studio background, soft even three-point lighting, full body, front 3/4 view. Keep the EXACT clean polished ivory-bone skull with fine cracks, the very large round and EXPRESSIVE LIVING brown eyes, and the tall slim athletic proportions of the provided base — a warm, alive, fierce skeleton athlete, NOT an undead, NOT a zombie, NOT a skeletal yokai, NOT decayed, grey or scary. No scene, no text, nothing held in the hands. Render PHOTOREALISTIC and semi-realistic cinematic: realistic aged ivory-bone texture with fine pores and hairline cracks, realistic brown eyes set inside the sockets (large and expressive but REALISTIC, not googly cartoon eyes) — NOT a cartoon, illustration, Pixar or 3D-animated style. IMPORTANT — Huesito is a FULL ANATOMICAL SKELETON wearing the regalia, NOT a human and NOT a person in a skull mask: bony skeletal hands with visible finger bones, exposed bony neck/spine and ankles; NO human flesh, NO human skin and NO human hands anywhere — only clean ivory bone shows wherever the body is not covered.

ingredients.generation_prompt: A group of three ancient Mesoamerican (Aztec and Maya) warrior-footballers, adult men with brown skin and black hair, photoreal. Described exactly: athletic players blending eagle-warrior and jaguar-warrior regalia with football kit — jade-green and turquoise woven sleeveless jerseys with gold-and-terracotta Aztec step-fret patterns (no crest, no sponsor); one wears a feathered eagle helmet with an open beak framing the face and golden-brown feathered arm guards; another wears a spotted jaguar pelt and a jaguar-head cowl; carved jade and obsidian ornaments, woven ball-game hip-belts in tan leather with jade studs, green sport socks and tan-leather football boots with obsidian studs; black-and-white war-paint markings. Fierce, ready, athletic stances. Rich feather, jade, woven-cloth and leather textures, vivid earthy colors. Plain neutral grey background, soft even lighting, full body group. Original cultural depiction, no logos, no readable text. Only adult men with brown skin and black hair.

A group of three ancient Roman gladiator-footballers, adult men of Mediterranean appearance, photoreal. Described exactly: muscular players in gladiator gear adapted for football — studded brown-leather harnesses over bare torsos, a single articulated steel shoulder-guard (galerus), wide tooled-leather belts and short red tunic skirts, bronze greaves on the shins, leather arm-wraps (manica); short red sport shorts under the skirts, sandal-cleats laced up the calf; some with a crested bronze helmet pushed back. A net and a trident lean nearby as props (not weapons in play). Battle-scarred bronze, steel and leather textures, deep reds and bronze tones. Aggressive, powerful stances. Plain neutral grey background, soft even lighting, full body group. No real emblems, no logos, no readable text. Only adult men.

A group of three ancient Japanese samurai-footballers, adult men of East-Asian appearance, photoreal. Described exactly: players in lacquered lamellar samurai armor adapted for football — deep indigo-and-crimson laced lamellar chest cuirasses and shoulder guards over athletic bodies, armored sleeves, dark sport shorts and shin guards; tabi-style football cleats; a katana sheathed at the hip as a prop (not used in play); some with a horned kabuto helmet, others bare-headed with topknots. Disciplined, precise, ready stances. Weathered lacquer, silk-lace and steel textures, indigo, crimson and black tones. Plain neutral grey background, soft even lighting, full body group. No real clan crests, no logos, no readable text. Only adult men.

A group of three ancient Spartan hoplite-footballers, adult men of Mediterranean appearance, photoreal. Described exactly: muscular players in classic Spartan gear adapted for football — deep crimson-red cloaks pinned at the shoulder over bronzed torsos, large round bronze hoplite shields (aspis) with a plain polished face and no emblem, bronze Corinthian crested helmets pushed up, bronze greaves, leather sport shorts and laced sandal-cleats. A long spear leans nearby as a prop. Gleaming bronze, crimson wool and leather textures. Fierce, phalanx-ready stances. Plain neutral grey background, soft even lighting, full body group. No real emblems, no logos, no readable text. Only adult men.

A group of three ancient Chinese Shaolin warrior-monk footballers, adult men of East-Asian appearance, photoreal. Described exactly: lean, agile players in saffron-orange and ochre layered monk robes belted and tucked for movement, cloth sashes at the waist, cloth wrist-wraps, shaved heads with traditional dot markings, simple cloth shoes reimagined as light football cleats; some mid martial-arts stance. Flowing cotton and linen robe textures, warm saffron, ochre and earth tones. Dynamic kung-fu ready poses. Plain neutral grey background, soft even lighting, full body group. No logos, no readable text. Only adult men.

A group of three ancient Norse Viking warrior-footballers, adult men of Northern-European appearance, photoreal. Described exactly: big rugged players in Viking gear adapted for football — riveted chainmail or thick fur-trimmed leather jerkins over athletic bodies, round wooden shields with iron bosses and plain painted faces (no emblem), conical iron helmets, fur mantles, leather bracers, sport shorts and fur-and-leather boots reimagined as cleats; braided beards and hair. A bearded axe leans nearby as a prop. Weathered iron, fur, leather and wool textures, cold greys, browns and deep blues. Fierce, brawny stances. Plain neutral grey background, soft even lighting, full body group. No real emblems, no logos, no readable text. Only adult men.

A single generic golden world-championship football trophy, photoreal. Described exactly: a tall polished gold cup, a sculpted abstract gold figure with arms raised supporting a rounded gold globe etched with faint continents, mounted on a dark banded base of green-veined stone; warm reflective gold surface with soft highlights. Generic and invented, NOT any real existing trophy, no emblems, no engraved names, no readable text. Plain neutral grey background, soft dramatic spotlight, centered, full object, razor-sharp detail. No logo, no text, no brand.

The interior of a colossal ancient Roman Colosseum repurposed as a football stadium, by day, empty of main characters on the pitch. A rectangular sand-and-grass pitch with chalk-white markings on the arena floor, ringed by towering tiers of stone seating packed with a roaring Roman-era crowd in togas and tunics waving banners, marble columns and arches, imperial red drapes, a bright blue sky above the open oval. Sunlit, grand, monumental, dust in the air. Empty pitch staging area, no main characters, photorealistic, wide cinematic composition. No readable text, no real emblems.

An ancient Japanese setting repurposed as a football field, by day, empty of main characters. A flat grass pitch with chalk markings before a multi-tiered wooden castle (tenshu) with curved tiled roofs, surrounded by blooming cherry trees shedding pink petals, tall plain war banners on poles, distant green mountains, soft diffused daylight. Serene yet grand, petals drifting. Empty pitch staging area, no main characters, photorealistic, wide composition. No readable text, no real crests.

An ancient Greek setting repurposed as a football field, by day, empty of main characters. A flat grass-and-marble pitch with chalk markings before the gleaming white marble columns of a Parthenon-like temple on a sunlit hill, ringed by tiered stone seating, olive trees, bronze tripods and plain banners, a brilliant Mediterranean blue sky. Sunlit, classical, majestic. Empty pitch staging area, no main characters, photorealistic, wide composition. No readable text, no real emblems.

An ancient Chinese setting repurposed as a football field, by day, empty of main characters. A flat grass pitch with chalk markings before a grand red-and-gold tiered temple with sweeping curved roofs and stone guardian lions, the Great Wall winding over green misty mountains in the distance, red lanterns and plain silk banners, soft hazy daylight. Tranquil, grand, atmospheric. Empty pitch staging area, no main characters, photorealistic, wide composition. No readable text, no real emblems.

An ancient Norse Viking setting repurposed as a football field, by overcast day, empty of main characters. A muddy grass pitch with chalk markings before timber longhouses with turf roofs and carved dragon-head posts, a grey fjord and snow-dusted mountains behind, round wooden shields and plain banners staked around, low cold mist, a moody overcast sky. Rugged, cold, epic. Empty pitch staging area, no main characters, photorealistic, wide composition. No readable text, no real emblems.

An ancient Mesoamerican setting repurposed as a football field, by golden day, empty of main characters. A long stone ball-court with sloped walls and a high carved stone ring, set before a great stepped pyramid (like Chichen Itza or Templo Mayor) under a vivid blue sky, surrounded by jungle greenery, feathered-serpent carvings, marigold-orange and jade decorations, tall feathered banners, warm tropical sunlight. Sacred, vivid, monumental. Empty court staging area, no main characters, photorealistic, wide cinematic composition. No readable text, no real emblems.

voiceover.text: [curious] ¿Qué pasaría si el Mundial de fútbol se hubiera jugado en la antigüedad, con los guerreros más temidos de la historia?

captions.text: Un Mundial… pero en la antigüedad.

visual.image_prompt: On the provided Colosseum stadium plate: KEY camera = a breathtaking sweeping aerial-to-wide crane shot of the colossal sunlit arena. The vast stone amphitheater is packed to the rafters with a roaring ancient crowd; on the sand-and-grass pitch below, banners of many ancient civilizations ripple as silhouetted warriors of different cultures mass at the edges ready to compete; dust and light beams cut across the arena. Epic, monumental, jaw-dropping scale, the dawn of the greatest tournament in history. Semi-realistic skeleton (NOT Pixar/cartoonish/clinical); the warriors are realistic adults of their respective ancient cultures (the Mesoamerican players have brown skin and black hair); only adults, no minors; NO gore (this is a football match, not real combat); no real emblems, crests, logos or modern brands; the cultural depictions are original with no IP; 9:16 vertical, no text. The ball in play is ALWAYS a modern black-and-white football (soccer ball), even though it is anachronistic for the era — never an ancient or leather ball.
visual.animation_prompt: KEY ACTION (first 2s): the camera sweeps down over the packed colossal arena, revealing the pitch and the massed warriors. SHOT: breathtaking aerial-to-wide crane. ANIMATE: the crowd roaring and waving banners, dust and light beams drifting, banners rippling, the scale unfolding. Keep the provided assets EXACTLY as provided; realistic adult warriors of their culture; ~6s. No gore. The ball in play is ALWAYS a modern black-and-white football (soccer ball), even though it is anachronistic for the era — never an ancient or leather ball.

voiceover.text: Imagina el torneo más brutal de todos los tiempos: las civilizaciones más poderosas de la historia, jugándose la gloria a balonazos.

captions.text: El torneo más brutal de la historia.

voiceover.text: [proud] Porque mientras los grandes imperios apenas peleaban por tierras, el balón… el balón siempre fue nuestro.

ending_card.style: texto grande sobre frame congelado de la copa frente a la pirámide; comment-bait, SIN '¿Parte 2?'

capcut_export.music_notes: Tambores tribales + épica orquestal creciente; cada presentación con un acento cultural breve; tensión cuando Roma anota (13); subidón en la remontada (14); estallido total en el gol y la copa (15-16).
capcut_export.sfx_notes: Rugido de multitud antigua y tambores; balonazos potentes; whoosh de katana (3) y patada Shaolin (5); choque de escudos (4); red que se agita en los goles; explosión de plumas y vítores (15-16).

tts_export.full_script: [curious] ¿Qué pasaría si el Mundial de fútbol se hubiera jugado en la antigüedad, con los guerreros más temidos de la historia? Imagina el torneo más brutal de todos los tiempos: las civilizaciones más poderosas de la historia, jugándose la gloria a balonazos. Roma presenta a sus gladiadores: entran al Coliseo y patean el balón como si fuera un combate a muerte. Japón manda a sus samuráis, con disciplina letal y dribles tan filosos como el acero de sus katanas. Grecia forma a los espartanos: una falange de escudos imposible de romper, ahora cerrada alrededor del balón. China suelta a sus monjes Shaolin, que driblan con kung fu y rematan con patadas voladoras imposibles. Y por la gloria también entran los vikingos con sus hachas, los faraones de Egipto y los jinetes mongoles. [proud] Pero nadie esperaba al equipo de Mesoamérica: guerreros águila y jaguar, con un crack imparable al frente. Y traían una ventaja brutal: el juego de pelota ya era suyo desde hacía miles de años. En octavos, Mesoamérica pasa por encima de los temibles vikingos sin despeinarse, con pura velocidad y técnica. En cuartos vencen a los espartanos a puro corazón, rompiendo esa falange que nadie había roto antes. En semifinal, un duelo de honor brutal contra los samuráis… y Mesoamérica avanza a la gran final. La gran final: Mesoamérica contra el imperio romano y sus gladiadores, en un Coliseo a reventar de gente. [tense] Roma pega primero con toda la fuerza de su imperio, y por un momento parece que la historia se repetirá. [determined] Pero los guerreros se levantan honrando a sus dioses, y empieza una remontada que hace temblar el Coliseo. [shouting] ¡Y cae el gol de la victoria! Mesoamérica conquista el primer Mundial de la historia, contra todos los imperios. [proud] Porque mientras los grandes imperios apenas peleaban por tierras, el balón… el balón siempre fue nuestro.
